summary: Made the M2 video path streaming latency and performance boundary explicit and machine-checkable. The bundle now records that the one-frame AV1/IVF artifact and command logs do not measure end-to-end streaming latency, encode latency, throughput, frame pacing/jitter, CPU utilization, GPU utilization, network behavior, or cross-device latency. Future streaming performance validation is documented as future work, not completed evidence.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Streaming latency and performance boundary is explicit and machine-checkable.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: bundle-manifest.json includes evidenceBoundary.machineCheckableClaims false values for streaming latency, encode latency, throughput, frame pacing/jitter, CPU utilization, GPU utilization, network behavior, and cross-device latency.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The one-frame AV1/IVF artifact and command logs are not presented as performance evidence.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m2-video-path-validation/notes.md and evidence/m2-nvenc-encode-sample/notes.md state that the sample and command logs do not measure streaming performance.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The low-latency encoder tune is recorded only as a setting.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The validation notes state that av1_nvenc tune=ll is a configured encoder mode only and no latency or performance result is claimed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Future latency/performance validation is noted as future work only.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: bundle-manifest.json evidenceBoundary.futureWorkForStreamingPerformanceValidation and report.md document the future-work boundary.
commands.log, report.md, json-validation.log, and completion.json are present for this node.

commandsRun.command: rg -n "end-to-end streaming latency|encode latency|throughput|frame pacing|CPU utilization|GPU utilization|network behavior|cross-device latency|tune=ll|future work" evidence/m2-video-path-validation/bundle-manifest.json evidence/m2-video-path-validation/notes.md evidence/m2-nvenc-encode-sample/notes.md evidence/m2-video-path-validation-does-not-measure-streaming-latency-or-p/report.md
commandsRun.evidence: Focused wording check found the performance non-claims and future-work strings in scoped files.
No file exceeded the repository line-count limit.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node clarifies evidence boundaries and non-claims only. It does not implement or validate live streaming, latency measurement, benchmarking, telemetry, or cross-device tests.
